text_zh: 到目前为止一直很有趣……
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is truly an honor to be part of your journey, and we are thrilled to hear you are having a blast with your characters. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going! If you ever have ideas or need help, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Stay awesome!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的消息让我们整个团队都开心极了！能成为您旅程的一部分真是我们的荣幸，听到您和角色们玩得开心，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是驱使我们不断前进的动力！如果您有任何想法或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。保持精彩！
